title: Settings
description: Layered settings.json overview (user / project / local) with key=value editing

raw.title: Quick write (key=value)
raw.hint: Value is parsed as JSON when possible, otherwise stored as a string

table.title: Effective settings
table.sourceIgnored: ⚠ This key lives in a layer Claude Code does not read — it has no effect; move it to an honored layer

worktree.title: Worktree
worktree.note: --worktree launch isolation is a CLI flag; this only configures the on-disk baseRef/bgIsolation (2.1.133/2.1.143).

isolation.noneHint: Background sessions share the current workspace
isolation.worktreeHint: Each background session gets its own git worktree

toggles.title: Safety switches
toggles.disableBundledSkillsDesc: Hide Claude Code's built-in skills (settings.json disableBundledSkills, 2.1.169). Written to the user layer.
toggles.safeModeDesc: A CLI launch flag that disables all customizations for troubleshooting. Not a settings field — run `claude --safe-mode`; the tool cannot toggle it.
toggles.cdDesc: A CLI command that switches working directory without breaking the cache. Read-only note.

catalog.autoMode: Auto mode config (≥2.1.207 no longer read from repo-resident settings.local.json)
catalog.classifyAllShell: Run ALL shell commands through the auto mode safety classifier
catalog.disableAutoMode: Disable auto mode (≥2.1.207 on by default on Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry)
catalog.pluginConfigs: Plugin option values (≥2.1.207 only user / --settings / managed layers honored)
catalog.sandboxCredentials: Block sandboxed commands from reading credential files and secret env vars
catalog.axScreenReader: Screen reader mode: plain-text rendering (also claude --ax-screen-reader)
catalog.vimInsertModeRemaps: Two-key insert-mode remaps in vim mode (e.g. jj → Escape)
catalog.respondToBashCommands: Whether Claude responds to ! command output (false restores old behavior)
catalog.fallbackModel: Fallback models (up to 3, tried in order when a model is unavailable)
catalog.defaultMode: Default permission mode ("default" renamed to manual in 2.1.200, both accepted)
catalog.requiredVersion: Enterprise version constraint (managed settings layer only)
catalog.enforceAvailableModels: Enforce the org model allowlist across every entry point
